---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or workflow improvement for Neo Studio
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem this solves

What workflow problem does this fix?

Example:

```txt
When I use the Image workspace with different model families, I need a faster way to switch between backend/workflow settings without rebuilding everything manually.
```

## Proposed solution

Describe how you think this should work.

## Where should it live?

Select or describe the area:

- [ ] Launcher / startup
- [ ] Image workspace
- [ ] Video workspace
- [ ] Assistant workspace
- [ ] Roleplay workspace
- [ ] Prompt / Captioning workspace
- [ ] Backend profiles
- [ ] Extensions
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Who is this for?

Who would benefit from this?

- [ ] Beginners
- [ ] Power users
- [ ] Local AI users
- [ ] API backend users
- [ ] Artists / designers
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Roleplay users
- [ ] Other:

## Why this matters

Explain the impact on workflow, speed, usability, reliability, or creative control.

## References

Add screenshots, mockups, examples, videos, links, or similar tools if useful.

## Extra context

Add anything else that may help evaluate the request.
